Sample HTML Document

This is a sample HTML document for testing the LocalConnector.

Introduction

This document contains various HTML elements to verify that the connector can properly extract text content from HTML files.

Features

  • Headings of different levels
  • Paragraphs with text content
  • Lists with items
  • Links to external resources

For more information, visit example.com.

Conclusion

The LocalConnector should successfully extract the text content from this HTML file, ignoring the markup tags and preserving the readable text.
